body:
APPROVE
All three AC items are met cleanly. Both prompt variants get the same directive, CLAUDE.md gains a parallel project-wide note, and tests assert both the literal prompt content and that the `{{.AttemptDir}}` placeholder substitutes to a real `.ddx/executions/` path. Scope stays tight to the bead.
